query:
UPDATE conversations c
JOIN (
  SELECT conversationId, MAX(createdAt) AS lastMsgAt
  FROM messages
  GROUP BY conversationId
) m ON c.id = m.conversationId
SET c.lastMessageAt = m.lastMsgAt
WHERE m.lastMsgAt IS NOT NULL;
